description.name: Eixample Modern Studio
description.headline: Stylish studio in the heart of Barcelona's Eixample district
description.description: A compact, thoughtfully designed studio apartment on the fourth floor of a classic Eixample building. Steps from Passeig de Gràcia, top restaurants, and the city's best shopping. Ideal for a couple or solo traveller exploring Barcelona.

reviews: Great location, everything you need for a short stay in Barcelona.
Clean and well-equipped. The neighbourhood is fantastic — so much to see and do.
